ul.li: dict uses O(1) slot = hash(key) & mask
SDS uses explicit len (binary-safe, no strlen)

text.tspan: 3. Command table uses dictFind() by name
4. For key operations, dictFind() looks up key

g.text: ht[0]: primary table | size = power of 2
ptr: void* | points to actual data
arity: argument count (-N = at least N)
